case_title: AMERICAN HOTELS, INC. vs. MANGANO, PHIL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JAN-26-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01

JUDGE G.OLNEY, K.GUBBINE,REPORTER, K.LEE,CLERK C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE BY COURT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT ATTY FOR PLTF IS THOMAS P. WRIGHT. DFT IS PRO PER. CASE IS SETTLED. JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT. TERMS ON THE RECORD. PLAINTIFF PREPARED JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MANGANO, PHIL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 161 POWELL ST. #507, S.F, CA. 94102 $300.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $300.00, STAYED UNTIL FEB-28-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, TO BE PAID AS FOLLOWS. $ 170 TO BE PAID ON OR BEFORE 020295. $ 130 BALANCE TO BE PAID ON OR BEFORE 021595. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
